title: NovaCore
body:
NovaCore is a library mod for creating NeoForge mods. It contains common classes for creating blocks, items, etc., and data generation classes.

# Why use a library mod?

Using a library mod removes a lot of boilerplate code required to get things up and running. This allows you to focus on what matters most and not spend a lot of time writing code that is required by the framework you choose.

# Planned Features

* Better support for NeoForge
* Eventually become framework agnostic and supports both NeoForge and Fabric.
  * Create NovaCore-API (Contains framework agnostic code for your mod)
  * Create NovaCore-NeoForge (Contains everything needed to bootstrap NeoForge mods)
  * Create NovaCore-Fabric (Contains everything needed to bootstrap NeoForge mods)

# Wiki

The [wiki](novamachina-mods.github.io) will have the most up-to-date information about NovaCore.

Check out [Discussions](https://github.com/NovaMachina-Mods/NovaCore/discussions) on GitHub.

# Issues

If you find an issue or a bug, please report it on [GitHub](https://github.com/NovaMachina-Mods/NovaCore/issues).

# Community
